title: lacryma
intro: Lacryma plant, also known as Lacryma Cristi or Christ's Tears, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lacryma plant include its potential to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate congestion, making it a valuable remedy for colds and flu. Lacryma plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used as a tincture or added to topical creams and ointments for its medicinal properties.
